title: S.O. 2276 (E) & S.O. 2277, dated 24/07/2013 - Appointment of Shri Justice S. Nayer Hussain and Shri Justice Dalip Singh as the Judicial Members of the National Green Tribunal.
description: S.O. 2276 (E) & S.O. 2277, dated 24/07/2013 - Appointment of Shri Justice S. Nayer Hussain and Shri Justice Dalip Singh as the Judicial Members of the National Green Tribunal.

Nayer Hussain, former Judge of Patna High Court, as the Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunalwith effect from 22" July, 2013 for a period of five years or till he attains the age of sixty-seven years, whichever is earlier. 3266 GII2013 (I) [F.No. 17(30)/2012-PL/NGT(VoI.IV)] SURJIT SINGH, Jt. ZZ77(E).-ln exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of Section 6 and Section 7 of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 (19 of 2010), the Central Government hereby appoints Shri Justice Dalip Singh, former Judge of Rajasthan High Court, as the Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunal with effect from the date of publication ofthis notification in the Official Gazette for a period of five vears or till he attains the age of sixtv-seven vears, whichever is earlier. [F.No. 17(30)/2012-PL/NGT(Vol. IV)) SURJIT SINGH, Jt. SecV.
